appendix_groups.description: Every reviewer independently chose exactly the same fine-grained WordNet label as the Maru2022 source label.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix A. All three reviewers selected the Maru2022 sense

appendix_groups.description: Every reviewer independently chose the same fine-grained WordNet label, and that label differs from the Maru2022 source label.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix B. All three reviewers selected the same correction

appendix_groups.description: All reviewers used a cannot-answer judgement rather than choosing a WordNet sense. These items are removed from the lexEN benchmark.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix C. All three reviewers judged the item unanswerable

appendix_groups.description: Exactly two reviewers agreed on a fine-grained WordNet label and the third reviewer gave a different answer.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix D. Two reviewers selected the same sense

appendix_groups.description: Exactly two reviewers used cannot-answer and the third reviewer selected a sense. These items are removed from the lexEN benchmark.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix E. Two reviewers judged the item unanswerable

appendix_groups.description: The three reviewers produced three different fine-grained answers. These items are removed from the lexEN benchmark.
appendix_groups.title: Appendix F. All three reviewers disagreed

sampled_items.rationale: WordNet lacks the figurative strategic-manoeuvring sense of game in this context.
The US ideological conservative reading is not cleanly captured by the party/member senses.
The computer-input sense is missing or underspecified, and Maru2022 support is weak.
The context likely means the way work is organised, while the available labels diverge.
The reviewers differ at fine WordNet level even though Glite coarsening makes them agree.
The functional/location use of act in the central nervous system does not map cleanly.
The gene-copy context for make proteins lacks a clean production sense in the inventory.
The fine-grained distinction is underdetermined even though coarse meaning is closer.
Specific genes means particular or individual genes, and reviewers did not converge.
Turned his attention to is a fixed research-focus use, not a reliable fine sense.
Dominate means strongly influence or prevail over, but the inventory split is unstable.
The intended involvement reading mixes participation and control, producing ambiguity.
Ready answer means prompt or available answer; the inventory does not fit cleanly.
All three choices are plausible but different, and Maru2022 has no support.
At the time is a fixed expression and does not support reliable fine-grained tagging.
The become-aware nuance exposes a WordNet definition boundary problem.
Encourage his company means make more likely or promote, not a clean available sense.
Investigation reveals mixes make-known and show evidence; WordNet is too narrow here.
Things got rougher uses thing as a general situation marker, not a clean WordNet sense.
Quiet has noise versus activity ambiguity; reviewers agree only after Glite coarsening.
